name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Be a card carrying member of Our Revolution
body:
Members are those who join at events or join by making any donation.
#
Friends,
As Our Revolution begins our second year, we're focusing on sustaining our movement by supporting our members and our groups. Members are those who join at events or join by making any donation. Membership is meant to be simple and inclusive. We encourage OR members to join groups or start a group. Our website includes a map of more than 400 registered groups with more added every week--find yours at https://ourrevolution.com/groups/.
For example, Somerville Our Revolution is part of an amazing network of Our Revolution groups across Massachusetts and nationally. Somerville has a full slate of council members and a mayoral candidate and the group hopes to change the direction of the entire city government. Our Revolution members there are working hard, lobbying their member of Congress on the eight national issues that make up the People's Platform.
A combination of issue work, candidates and ballot measures, and political organizing make up the core of Our Revolution member involvement. But many members choose to engage through online action and are not members of groups. No matter how members contribute, we are building a unique political movement that goes beyond resisting Donald Trump and the politics of reaction, instead fighting for a progressive populist future.
**[Will you become an official member of Our Revolution? Contribute any amount and we will send you a membership package that includes:](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb75c/3842866414/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-revolution?refcode=em170907-full")**
* Our Revolution membership card
* Welcome packet from myself and staff
* Free Our Revolution sticker
* Monthly membership newsletter

[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb75c/3842866414/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-revolution?refcode=em170907-full")
You will also receive surveys to make your voice heard and shape the future of Our Revolution, as well as being connected with a local Our Revolution group or status as a Member-at-Large.
**[Become an official member of Our Revolution and take the next step to build Our Revolution up from the grassroots and prepare us for the fights to come.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb75c/3842866414/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-revolution?refcode=em170907-full")**
My hopes are shared with millions of people across this country--I look forward to what we can accomplish together.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb75c/3842866414/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/join-our-revolution?refcode=em170907-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb75f/3842866414/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb75e/3842866414/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb759/3842866414/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afab/bed43eb/56f5913/75ffb758/3842866414/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: The White House
subject: The President's Weekly Address
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4e42ecaa1dede083648af7a2a1b753cbf99320728e04775f0a3cb02a03dedb4b1f7cb0ee011d9ae34736bed83cd0f8f2eb7f036f097b63a5

-------------

Hurricane Irma Preparation

President Trump and Vice President Pence met with senior members of the Administration yesterday to discuss initial Federal support for Hurricane Irma preparation, response and recovery, as well as ongoing support for recovery from Hurricane Harvey.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4e42ecaa1dede083932390a169c6dafd190ebccd33eecd5909c936aeb4f55aedc9535a6321033c660fe613a3ab2ca9768c68f358eca10fc7
Read more

President Trump Approves Disaster Declarations

President Trump has approved an emergency declaration in the States of
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4e42ecaa1dede08374e3e385b4681368922f3e32b3438072fbf36d5eabbdb6a0dd9194c4334829b92c6e490e89d8d13f914a4a69acf36acf
South Carolina ,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4e42ecaa1dede083d98d1b0e3cddc5dc83dd80805ef87d1e000615572def8d985647ec0d63944bb68a37c0c2e9f51033c238b47dce066eec
Georgia , and the territory of the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4e42ecaa1dede083f06997442f4cdc63911520f9885015bf1eac187c3d298cf56501d4f760eea32d71874fcb147a5052f9085e19e9e6a070
U.S. Virgin Islands .

President Trump Welcomes the Amir Sabah al-Ahmed al-Jaber al-Sabah of Kuwait

On Thursday, President Trump met with the Amir Sabah al-Ahmed al-Jaber al-Sabah of Kuwait to discuss the importance of cooperation between the United States and Kuwait in defeating terrorism as well as the economic partnership the two nations share. The Amir extended his thoughts and condolences to those affected by Hurricane Harvey and Hurricane Irma.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4e42ecaa1dede083df0214103085e6d311f92433d63a7b5585b2719d7b3d3711a9723148195d891b069efdfcc8f0195f06ff29c730d8b455
Watch the joint press conference

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and Amir Sabah al-Ahmed al-Jaber al-Sabah of Kuwait | September 7, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Stephanie K. Chasez)

Coming Up this Weekend

President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump have invited all members of the Cabinet and their spouses to Camp David this weekend. President Trump will hold his fourth Cabinet meeting on Saturday and will lead discussion on the Administration's priorities in addition to receiving briefings on Hurricane Harvey recovery efforts and preparation for Hurricane Irma.

name: Team Kaine
subject: President Trump Betrays Young DREAMers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| **Trump Will End DACA Program

This is a betrayal to young DREAMers who are strengthening Virginia and America. Tell him DREAMers are here to stay:**

**[DEFEND DACA](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ic3Ml5xJXnezLwElDjkNzW2iqAiOFVlN)**
---
Just last week, Tim Kaine met with a group of DREAMers in Alexandria to hear how DACA, or the "Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals" program, has helped them pursue their dreams. America has always been a nation of immigrants -- these DREAMers have made Virginia stronger and our economy more successful.

But now, President Trump is going back on his word and putting hundreds of thousands of young Americans, including more than 12,000 in Virginia, at risk of separation from their families by ending the DACA program as we know it.

This is a heartless decision that betrays these incredible young DREAMers who Trump said he would treat with "great heart."

**[These incredible kids came out of the shadows believing in the promise of America. This nation is their home. Tell President Trump not to send them back.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=eOIlY5XdNbibkpwwzZkQHG2iqAiOFVlN)**

Thank you for defending DACA.

\- Team Kaine | | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: Congress must act now to protect DREAMers (add your name)
body:
Republicans want to eliminate Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals protections for young immigrants.
---
**Donald Trump has rescinded DACA. Tell Republicans in Congress they must act to protect DREAMers:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-DREAMers1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170908_joc_nd&source=em_20170908_joc_nd")**
Derek --

Ending DACA is the most outrageous, cruel act of Donald Trump's presidency.

For nearly 800,000 young immigrants, DACA gives them the peace of mind to live, go to school, and work in the only country they have called home.

Threatening the livelihoods of DREAMers isn't just a political issue -- it's a moral one. DREAMers were brought here as children, whether to escape danger in other countries or in search of the American dream, and have lived in the United States for the majority of their lives.

DREAMers contribute to our economy, their communities, and pay taxes. They are our friends and neighbors. They are teachers, first responders, and service members. And it's no surprise that nearly 90% of Americans support putting legal protections for them in place.

We must speak out against Trump's discriminatory decision and demand Congress protect DREAMers through legislation like the DREAM Act.

**Add your name, and tell Congress to act now:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-DREAMers1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170908_joc_nd&source=em_20170908_joc_nd")**
Thanks,

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: Hurricane Irma Relief: How you can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Americans need our help again. |
---
| | |

Peter,

Despite the destruction and despair caused by Hurricane Harvey, the world watched as Americans do what we do best -- help each other during the worst of circumstances.

Now we are called to action once again.

**Hurricane Irma has already devastated the Caribbean and is on track to hit Florida and parts of Georgia and South Carolina and continues to be extremely dangerous.**

_President Donald J. Trump and I once again encourage you to extend a helping hand to our fellow Americans in need by contributing to one of the following charities:_

**[Samaritan's Purse](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014eba95ef4b845d8a704c6a5da94ab20339a58cf2651355f554d313e9b80e3be8baa7da8a730ca32593)
[Salvation Army](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014e661857303d641706fde0e07558c7180fe0fc20e4b8d8f348f95e6b916ce4a8f1d0c03827a76bce93)
[The Red Cross](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014e3a642df29412b421c29dca0c79f3b03d14d00179e9b041d4bfde677f9204e227d6a7a1131dee8ed5)
[Reach Out America](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014e1302a6fe2102629cfdabe8c09ffec0b4ee74bb4e3f7801b3b2f9f5cab8481a557cb5475101179b63)
[Catholic Charities](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014e407d6c477fc8d6f26ad67a7e851188fa821873cfb3c4c83d5a607ac1605a17643c7852df60424254)
[American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014e5f99e83e4910d879e5ffb3b7c3492896c2f94ce20625f037e7fef9cfcbafea0d30ec320b3c99659e)
[Direct Relief](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014ea48b4974030c5c5c81da868773e23527c5779a11b14613646f86206c9e740d4bb03ea900e7e81341)

[The Humane Society](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014e8b5097e4ae5fc7a45be919c050df997c413716e0cda61409160964d7b0aee76f205993f92594c75e)
[Operation Blessing International](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014eda7926397f22445356de590b06ec95e68e3ce72f804f25c85e456804a0512c388af4403cbbcb3255)
[Portlight Inclusive Disaster Strategies](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014ef787772c0e0ac63e2e9d46f342e6b37f38210810e92bc54c47a1f2d14943b555fef1fa4ed91d275f)
[Team Rubicon](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ffaf094f7363014ee5b8f78af4613566c65ff15e3fdc0cf941499ae6fbedad94ba3aa918b63bd87806f2cd7df4456b44)**

Thank you for your generosity and may God bless everyone affected by this tragic hurricane.

Ronna McDaniel

subject: New Hampshire GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Voter Registration Report
body:
**New Hampshire GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Voter Registration Report**
**For Immediate Release:** September 8, 2017
**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
Concord – New Hampshire GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding the recent report on 2016 voter registrations made with out-of-state IDs:
“I want to thank Speaker Jasper and the dedicated members of our state government who sought this information regarding same day registrations from 2016 using out-of-state IDs. The most troubling piece of this report was the roughly 200 voters that may have voted twice in multiple states, uncovered by the new crosscheck program. We must support investigations into these cases to ensure integrity at the ballot box.”
“While the New Hampshire Democrat Federal Delegation engages in a public squabble with New Hampshire’s Democrat Secretary of State, New Hampshire Republicans are working hard to ensure every eligible New Hampshire voter can vote while strengthening voter integrity.”

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
**_Indiana Proves Tax Reform Works -[Sign the Petition for Federal Tax Reform Today](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=42faab5611&e=1acd9bb3d6)_** America’s tax system is out of control. It takes taxpaying Americans more than 6 billion hours each year to comply with the dizzying rules and regulations that accompany filing the typical Form 1040. While complexity might be the preference of Washington, simplicity and fairness is what Hoosiers prefer. And it’s what Hoosiers get.

If you agree that we need a federal tax system that puts American taxpayers first - just as we've put Hoosier taxpayers first here in Indiana - [click here to sign The White House Tax Reform Petition](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a9505784f1&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Indiana has already sketched out the blueprint for how tax relief works and how it benefits everyone across the board, now let's do it across the country. Click [here to sign the White House Tax Reform Petition](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=db2d401923&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [here to read my entire op-ed](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3215afd6eb&e=1acd9bb3d6) on how Indiana's tax reform blueprint can help our nation's economy grow.
\- Kyle Hupfer

(Photo: Chairman Hupfer presides over the Senate District 20 Caucus in Noblesville on Wednesday night.)
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
| Just before heading to Japan for an economic development trip, Governor **Eric Holcomb** [made](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c9aecaa3f7&e=1acd9bb3d6) a [lot](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8821e9a160&e=1acd9bb3d6) of [headlines](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87b6abfab7&e=1acd9bb3d6) with the announcement that Delta Airlines will begin offering a non-stop flight from Indianapolis to Paris in May 2018. As Chairman Hupfer [said](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7367e8f5dc&e=1acd9bb3d6), "We are making Indiana even more attractive to those businesses by making ourselves more accessible to global commerce. Without a doubt, Indiana’s doors are wide open to Europe and transatlantic markets like never before and Governor Eric Holcomb and his team of proven leaders are to thank for this incredible news." In fact, it's estimated that in adding this direct flight to Paris, Indiana will see an additional $50 million in economic impact.

The governor also announced this week that Britni Saunders will become the next Director of the Indiana State Personnel Department.
---
|
---
| [ ](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ff6a27645&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **Marsha Coats Resigns from RNC,
Victoria Spartz Elected to State Senate**
For decades now, **Marsha Coats** (photo on left) has dedicated herself to the Republican Party and the conservative cause. While that service will undoubtedly continue as she serves alongside her husband, Director of National Intelligence Dan Coats, her time as Indiana's Republican National Committeewoman has come to a close with the announcement that she is resigning the post. We thank Marsha for her always positive attitude and willingness to represent Indiana on the national stage. If anyone is interested in filling this importance vacancy, please contact us at info@indiana.gop. You can read Chairman Hupfer's statement [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ee9dc6c59&e=1acd9bb3d6).

But while Marsha is stepping aside, another dynamic female leader is coming to the fore. **Victoria Spartz** (photo on right) was selected by her fellow precinct committee members to replace outgoing State Senator Luke Kenley during a caucus this week. Senator-elect Spartz, who is a native of Ukraine, is the former vice chair of the Hamilton County Republican Party, a current 5th Congressional District Officer, a CPA and an adjunct professor. Congratulations to Senator-elect Spartz on her selection! You can read Chairman Hupfer's statement on the caucus [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=eafd0a2702&e=1acd9bb3d6).

clean_body: | | | | | | Indiana Proves Tax Reform Works - America’s tax system is out of control. It takes taxpaying Americans more than 6 billion hours each year to comply with the dizzying rules and regulations that accompany filing the typical Form 1040. While complexity might be the preference of Washington, simplicity and fairness is what Hoosiers prefer. And it’s what Hoosiers get. If you agree that we need a federal tax system that puts American taxpayers first - just as we've put Hoosier taxpayers first here in Indiana - . Indiana has already sketched out the blueprint for how tax relief works and how it benefits everyone across the board, now let's do it across the country. Click and on how Indiana's tax reform blueprint can help our nation's economy grow. \- Kyle Hupfer (Photo: Chairman Hupfer presides over the Senate District 20 Caucus in Noblesville on Wednesday night.) | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Just before heading to Japan for an economic development trip, Governor Eric Holcomb a of with the announcement that Delta Airlines will begin offering a non-stop flight from Indianapolis to Paris in May 2018. As Chairman Hupfer , "We are making Indiana even more attractive to those businesses by making ourselves more accessible to global commerce. Without a doubt, Indiana’s doors are wide open to Europe and transatlantic markets like never before and Governor Eric Holcomb and his team of proven leaders are to thank for this incredible news." In fact, it's estimated that in adding this direct flight to Paris, Indiana will see an additional $50 million in economic impact. The governor also announced this week that Britni Saunders will become the next Director of the Indiana State Personnel Department. | | | | | Marsha Coats Resigns from RNC, Victoria Spartz Elected to State Senate For decades now, Marsha Coats (photo on left) has dedicated herself to the Republican Party and the conservative cause. While that service will undoubtedly continue as she serves alongside her husband, Director of National Intelligence Dan Coats, her time as Indiana's Republican National Committeewoman has come to a close with the announcement that she is resigning the post. We thank Marsha for her always positive attitude and willingness to represent Indiana on the national stage. If anyone is interested in filling this importance vacancy, please contact us at info@indiana.gop. You can read Chairman Hupfer's statement . But while Marsha is stepping aside, another dynamic female leader is coming to the fore. Victoria Spartz (photo on right) was selected by her fellow precinct committee members to replace outgoing State Senator Luke Kenley during a caucus this week. Senator-elect Spartz, who is a native of Ukraine, is the former vice chair of the Hamilton County Republican Party, a current 5th Congressional District Officer, a CPA and an adjunct professor. Congratulations to Senator-elect Spartz on her selection! You can read Chairman Hupfer's statement on the caucus . | | News You Can Use Lt.
